name: Nizhny Novgorod (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the silver field of the city's medieval coat of arms
the deer of the city's arms

description: A white field charged centrally with a red walking deer with black hooves and antlers — the historic emblem of Nizhny Novgorod.
history: The walking red deer has been the emblem of Nizhny Novgorod since at least the 16th century. The modern city flag, restoring the historical emblem, was adopted on 20 December 2006 by the Nizhny Novgorod City Duma.

features.role: Red walking deer (the historic emblem of Nizhny Novgorod)
features.symbolism: the medieval emblem of the city
